reviews.review_text: Noisy room.. you can hear everything your  neighbours are doing

Nice quiet place. Good location. Clean rooms.

Only suggestion would be to put a gate between the big pool and kids area for safety reasons.
Good location for visiting Mackay & surrounds
Was comfortable nice amenities

Cabin was dirty, dust and dog hair on the floor but the 2 small chairs provided in the room were covered in dog hair. I get that the cabin is pet friendly but you still have to be able to clean it for the next people. We couldn't sit in the chairs during our short stay. There were crumbs of food on the dining chairs left behind from previous guests.
The location of the cabin meant every guest who pulled into the park entrance at night lit up our cabin some with high beams still on.
Wifi was non existant.
Park location was pretty by the water overall the park wasnt up to the usual standard we've come to expecr from Discovery.
They are extremely helpful here. The cabin was perfect. We only wish we spent more time there. Thank you!

We stayed here during our road trip with my husband, our two young kids, and our two dogs. The facilities were clean, and the beds were spacious and comfortable. It was even better that the kids could enjoy some water play before check-out.

It was fine for a one-night stay.
One of the toilet blocks was closed.
The toilets were spacious and clean.
The campsite kitchen could do with a bit of a clean, and it needs a proper stove for cooking, as there was only a barbecue. The fridge contained old food covered in mould and gave off a nasty smell. They definitely need to clean it out.

Estuvo bien para pasar una noche.
Un sector de baños estuvo cerrado.
Los baños eran amplios y limpios.
A la cocina del camping le falta un poco de limpieza, y una cocina para cocinar, ya que solo había bbq. La heladera tenía comida vieja, con hongos, salía olor feo. Deberían limpiarla sin dudas.

The park itself is clean and the staff are friendly, but dealing with upper management has been really disappointing.

We’re a Queensland family relocating to Mackay with two young kids (2 and 9). Both of us are working and our youngest is in daycare, so things are already full on. Since November 2025 we’ve spent thousands staying with Discovery Parks while trying to find and buy a place locally.

All we asked for was a short transitional stay with a clear exit date, and we even offered to sign an agreement to lock that in. The only response we got was that there’s a “new policy” and that “it should have never happened.”

That didn’t really make sense, especially when their own info says extensions can be discussed with reception and approved by management. From what we could see, other longer stays were still happening as well.

Because of this, we’re now having to pack up and move every 40 days, which is honestly tough when you’re juggling work, school, daycare and trying to settle into a new area.

We weren't trying to stay long-term just needed a bit of stability while we sort out a home and get set up properly in the region.
The hardest part isn’t even the “no”, it’s the lack of consistency and support when it feels like there could have been some flexibility.

A bit of understanding here would have made a big difference.
This place has been a haven, beautoful friendly warm staff, lovely grounds clean amenities. Its gorgeous here!
모기는 퀸즈랜드의 심각한 골치 거리다. 그러나 모든 캐러밴 파크가 모기 때문에  문제가 있는건 아니다.  늦은 저녁 도착해서 수도와 전기라인 설치하는 단 5분간 10군데이상 물렸어요. 산책 나갔던 와이프도 급히 들어오고 … 시설은 좋았으나 모기문제 정말 심각함. 다음날 도망치듯 캠핑장 빠져 나왔어요. 추천하지 않아요.
Great place for families and kids.

this park was very pretty and great for the kids to make friends and walk around. Lovely undercovered outdoor bbq areas. This park isn’t annoying and isn’t always checking when it comes to the rules and is mostly relaxed. The wifi is horrible and the whole time we stayed there the slide was shut and the main pool was hot. The park also did a christmas decorating competition and said there was a prize for the winners and never announced the winners, so people set all there lights up for nothing. during christmas day that had santa drive around and throw presents, that was very fun and involving and staff were so nice.

Wow!! What a disgrace!! This park was the worst one we have ever stayed at!! The reception staff was unbelievably RUDE!! a bunch of absolute cows! Nasty attitudes! We stayed for a week $600 mind you for a powered site. The slide wasn't running half the week, we were speaking to others in the park about the main pool harvesting bacteria and making families sick!! It got closed the 2nd half of the week. This park is only after money!! No costumer support given whatsoever! Happy to take money but if you want to cancel booking they will take that to... even when the park is half empty. I will be warning ⚠️ everyone I can to not waste your time or money here. This park needs to be closed down!

Well my wife and I have done a lot of travelling and stayed in myriad of Hotels/Motels/Caravan Parks so I feel I can make a fair review on the Mackay Discovery Park. We were travelling with our dog and were lucky enough to get a Dog Friendly Cabin. We were offered a second night at reduced rate however declined the offered due to our travel plans.  Well they changed so went back to take up the offer. Well in the 15 minutes it took to work things out the cabin was taken by another traveller.  We were the offered an upgrat still with the same great discount. I will say at this time the original cost was far cheaper than our accommodation of like type we had the previous night.The rooms were very clean, great size bathroom/toilet plenty of cooking equipment, the bed was the best we had ever had in our travels. The assistance provided by the staff was second to none. We will be back.

Really enjoyed our stay  in our caravan here. We had a site beside the wetlands, and loved the birdlife and serenity. Our ensuite was clean and well set out. Not a lot of shade around the park (palm trees don't provide much shade) but grass was green and well kept. We'll stay there again when in Mackay.

Das war mit Abstand der schlechteste Discovery Campingplatz wo wir bis jetzt waren. Zunächst einmal war der große Pool gesperrt weshalb man in dem Kinderpool schwimmen gehen musste. Dies wurde uns jedoch nicht mit geteilt obwohl uns die Örtlichkeit des Pools auf der Karte gezeigt wurde. Nachdem wir zwischen mehreren Kindern im Kinderpool schwimmen waren wollten wir bei der BBQ Area grillen. Wir hatten unseren Salat sowie unser Fleisch in den Gemeinschaftskühlschrank gelegt für ca. 1 Stunde. Als wir gerade anfangen wollten war unser Grillfleisch weg. Nachdem wir eine Nummer des Campingplatzes angerufen haben erklärte uns die Frau dass wir unser Essen hätten beschriften sollen und sie nichts machen kann. Aufjedenfall unser Fehler dass wir unser Zeug nicht beschriftet haben jedoch war der Salat noch da somit konnte keine Verwechslung vorlegen und unser Fleisch wurde definitiv geklaut. Nachdem wir heute Früh erneut bei der Rezeption nach gefragt haben ob es möglich wäre die Kamera auszuwerten wurde uns erneut nicht geholfen und gesagt da kann man nichts machen. Dazu kommt dass unser Strom auf unserer Camp Site nicht funktionierte. Haben dann den Strom von einer anderen Camp Site genutzt.
Rund um hatten wir wirklich keinen angenehmen Aufenthalt und verlassen diesen Campingplatz mit einem genervten Gefühl.

After having had a terrible week and arriving at the park a bit early, it was unbelievable service by Jayde. She organised a back up cabin in case our van was in longer for repair and generally made me feel so much calmer than when I walked in. Really appreciate the amazing service. The site was mowed, clean and plenty of facilities for kids too. Thank you
Places are clean and well maintained! Recommend!

We always love staying at Discovery Parks Mackay! The price is really good and there’s heaps for the kids to do. They even have food vans that pop in sometimes which is a nice touch, saves having to cook every night. Jayde and the team are absolute legends, always go out of their way to make sure our stay is the best it can be. Super friendly, helpful, and just make you feel welcome every time. Can’t recommend it enough.
We stayed in a cabin, which had everything you need, it was well maintained and clean. Very happy with our stay here.

We recently stayed here with our two young children and I'm unsure who enjoyed it more, us or them. Was a fantastic park, in a easy and convenient location. The staff are absolutely amazing and the facilities were so clean and easily accessible. My kids already want to go back! Thank you for making our stay so enjoyable, will definitely be recommending to our friends and family!

We had a fantastic stay at Mackay Discovery Parks! The grounds were spotless, beautifully maintained, and full of lush greenery that made it feel so relaxing. The cabins were clean, comfortable, and well-equipped — everything we needed for an easy, enjoyable getaway.

The kids loved the pool and playground, and the staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, always ready with a smile and great local tips. It’s in a perfect location too — close to town, the beach, and plenty of attractions.

Highly recommend for families, couples, or anyone wanting a peaceful, well-run park to unwind in. We’ll definitely be back!

Thanks for our weekend stay at Mackay Discovery!! Clean ammenities, drive through sites for our van and heaps of activities for the kids! The pools were clean and well looked after and the staff friendly and accomodating. We will be stopping in on our way through Mackay anytime.

Stayed with my family and can say our needs were met. A beautiful clean park, very friendly staff and many activities for the kids. Only a short drive to the stunning harbour.
When staying in Mackay we recommend this beautiful park to everyone. Thanks Jayde & team for your amazing hospitality during our stay.

I was invited by a friend to check out this park. I didn’t realise you could pay $10 for a day pass and use all the equipment. The kids loved the waterpark, mini golf and jumping pillow. We are headed back next weekend for some barra fishing. Such a cheap and amazing day out. Although we didn’t see inside the rooms if the rest of the park was anything to go by I’d say they would have been well maintained. I encourage anyone to check it out.
Great price and location

Awesome clean place.
Stayed opposite the jumping castle.
Very clean amenities.
Shower water pressure could be increased, otherwise 10/10.

Definitely coming back
Take your pest spray got absolutely carried away by mosquitoes day and night
Ein schön abgelegener Campingplatz Zimmer habe ich nicht bewertet, da wir mit dem Camper vor Ort waren. Alles ordentlich und sauber am großen See gelegen.

The first tome we stayed the room was dirty. mouldy windows dirty floor. I understand it's a dog cabin but that doesn't excuse the cleanness of the Cabin.
Be aware the road it's right next to the park and trucks all night with the brakes going off as they slow. At least the beds were clean and fresh.
Second stay on the way bk we stayed in a different Cabin much cleaner expect someone else dog hair all over the lounge.

Terrible park to stay in. The park is run down  with the rooms damaged and unclean. We were given the wrong room, told it was an 'upgrade' by staff when, it's clearly a cheaper cabin online then what was booked. The blanket was unwashed and smelt like dog, which was crumpled at the end of unmade bunks. There was no fitted sheet on the mattess so we had to make up the bed upon check in with a spare flat sheet. There was mould on the blinds, windows and bathroom, a super noisy fan and loud highway out the window. The slide was out of service for our stay, with a green looking pool.
The stay was so terrible we stayed 1 night out of 3, even though we couldn't get a refund. I have stayed in other Discovery parks and thought they would be all to a standard, unfortunately the Mackay one is truly awful.
The lovely lady at reception managed to find a site for us at the last minute. The site area was a very quiet spot so a big thank you for getting us in for the 3 nights.

We asked for a grass powered site, large enough for our van. The site we were given was okay. We would just fit our van. We asked if they had an ensuite site and they were very accommodating and allowed us to move. Thank you.

We used the caravan park.  Sites were level and ours had a concrete slab.  The only area for improvement is the smell of the bins that permeated our van.  The wetlands at the rear of the park were beautiful with an abundance of water birds.
Nice park provided you are on the lagoon side .. The other side has permanent residents some of who are noisy and argued late into the night.

Great Caravan Park.  Large sites easy entry.  Amenities excellent.   Plenty hot water and pressure in mens showers.  Staff courteous and helpful.  Three swiming pools two for adults and one for children.  Jumping Bag for kids.  Mini golf. Quite of a night minor traffic noise.   I had a relaxing stay.
Nice place cabin floor was quite dirty

Misleading Cancellation Policy – Be Aware Before Booking

I had to cancel my booking due to personal reasons. It was only for one night, and I cancelled well in advance. However, I was told that the entire amount I had already paid would be kept as a cancellation fee. At no point during booking was this made clear — there was no obvious email, notice, or clear instructions outlining that I’d lose the full payment.
I feel the cancellation terms should have been communicated clearly and transparently before confirming the booking. Disappointing experience, and I would advise others to double-check the cancellation policy before booking here.
Got a powered ensuite site... super place and great staff. Very friendly and helpful.
Awesome staff, pretty park, well maintained, family friendly

It’s your average inner city caravan park.
Decent sites. Clean amenities
Bit out of yown
Lovely place to stay quite central to shopping centre, selection of dog friendly beaches.

Mackay Discovery Park is based on the main road to the Marina and located on a lovely waterfront area with beautiful sunset views. The drive-through sites were large and easy to access, however there are minimal trees or shade. The mini-golf area and swimming pool is fantastic (although too cold for us to use).
The thing that disappointed us was that there are 4 washing machines, and only 1 in operation - when I asked at the office they said will be a couple of weeks wait??? So you had to "Queue" your washing to finally get to use the only machine which was difficult when your just travelling through.
Otherwise a great park to stay in and the ensuite sites are excellent.
Cheers from Frank & Tracey

Originally when I checked in, I would've been generous with a one star review. However, when the issue was brought up with the front desk not only did they address it right away, they looked after me. There was nothing that was too much for the staff. They went above and beyond and could not recommend this place any higher.
Clean and tidy park.    We only stayed for one night    would recommend to others.

The staff were friendly at check-in, thank you for the kit kat treat. It was nice that my request for being close to Amenities was made possible. Some showers have been converted to toilets, lovely to be able to open the toilet doors to the outside. Lovely, warm showers good set up, clean. Overall lovely stay. A lot of  people had a one night stop over.
Unbelievable, great service so friendly. It's definitely a stay for the next event up here.
Great for the family. Lovely clean rooms. Pet friendly
Great caravan park, great views, not far from town and shops, staff are very helpful and friendly. Van sites are large enough for most sizes, with good parking for the tow vehicle.

Anywhere else if you are told that you've been upgraded be happy, but here it means your closer to the mosquito infested lake.

The location itself is close to the city.

Facilities were on parr with other parks

Wouldn't recommend this park due to mosquito nfested lake
Woman working the reception desk is really rude.
Great place to stay activities for the kids & you if you wish friendly staff & they have long term available as well

Great Value for money and was stunning! Quiet and so much for kids to do
Loved that it's pet friendly and would definitely stay again! Highly recommend

4 hours 3 phone calls and a message left each time in order to make a booking. What’s the point of waiting 3 minutes for all your recordings and then no one ever rings back ?

Poor customer service, upon reading other feedback, seams to be “the norm” with GDay parks.

Just not good enough. I wanted to book. Will find elsewhere.

We were travelling from Cairns to Wollongong with our cats due to relocating and wanted to space out the drive. We were driving long hours everyday and couldn't get there before checkin, I was able to phone and arrange for the keys and a map to be left in the safe for us to collect. The lady I spoke to was so friendly and helpful.

Iv been stuck here in Mackay for 9 days with Van problems
The lady's here at the park are looking after me with a clean towels sheet stacking up my coffee sugar  Ect  very pleased 😁
Just what we needed..

On a lengthy trip relocating from Melbourne to Cairns with my wife, father and two dogs. We had stayed at many different accommodations... some were terrible to say the least and the customer service or lack thereof was worse. When I say that reaching Mackay to this park who had the cleanest, loveliest, immaculate cabins which allowed our dogs to stay inside was a relief I can't describe! The customer service was second to none as every staff member I spoke to was friendly, helpful, and accommodating to our needs. They even allowed us to park our big rig (truck + car trailer about 30m in length) for no extra cost. The value & experience of this place was amazing. They made a very long difficult trip a joy for at least one night on our way through! Thank you! Wouldn't hesitate to recommend to anyone!

We love staying here, the facilities are super clean, modern and well maintained at reasonable costs.
Staff are super friendly, lovely park to walk around and meet other travelers.

Absolutely appalling customer service from the front desk lady/camp manager.
Her attitude and behaviour was beyond atrocious and unbelievably unprofessional.

Being called "hillbilly's" to our faces for putting up a gazebo, camp table and chairs on Christmas Day
If the issue was the location of where it was, the situation could have easily have been spoken about and we wouldve happily have moved it to where we were allowed. But no communication just horrible, offensive language used towards us which put a foul taste in our mouths.

This is so disrespectful and completely unacceptable from someone in her position of 'authority'
Instead of ensuring we had a safe and happy stay & experience,  we were made to feel not welcome and very uncomfortable

We went as far as checking with the grounds keeper the next day to see what the issue was and he replied with the fact that he actually had no issue with it just that we weren't allowed to have a bqq left out (gas bottle)

We had 3 families stay throughout 3 cabins for a week over Christmas and are disappointed in this whole situation

Also, the cabins with 1 bed room and a set of bunks in the main area is extremely dangerous and need to be taken away asap
That top bunk is extremely close to the ceiling fan and should not be able to host that bunk bed for safety reasons
HUGE DANGER AND SAFETY HAZARD

During our stay there were dogs brought into the pool area with families

Will not recommend this accommodation to anyone

We stayed here from the 27th of Dec 2024 to the 3rd of Jan 2025. Rooms were clean we had a double bedroom family cabin. 2 adults 3 kids. Close the Mackay Harbour and shops. Pool was amazing with a water slide to keep kids happy, mini golf, jumping pillow and a lake to fish in.  The washing machines you can pay by card which was great for us. Nice big deck to enjoy the fresh air con in all rooms. We will definitely book here again. Thank you for the stay.

Good sized sites. Deep pool over 2m deep. Water slide splash park jumping pillow mini golf pedal cars and a lake for fishing
The kids club from 9 to 12 do great daily activities with something different each day. Nice and quiet and well looked maintained

Room was super clean and park staff were very nice, able to leave a/c on in the heat and the room was pre cooled on arrival which is nice on a hot day and long drive, make sure to lock cars and take valuables inside, great pool and waterslide for kids

If have more then one car can’t park at cabin. Got to park at guest park at front. With no fence or gating. An people can park on side of road and run in to steal stuff off car. Lucky canopy was locked. Both sides where same

We stay here often. Have stayed in 3 different cabin types.  My only issue was that the TV in all cabins I've stayed in are not smart TV's.  I was wanting to watch a movie on netflix,  had to watch on my phone.
Caravan sites were great.  We love the ensuite sites at the back.  We like to take the kid fishing.  Its also lovely to watch a sunrise and watch the wildlife come alive.  The ducks and pelicans on the water just lovely. Easy access for the car.  Just need to be careful our 22 ft van with a bike on the back depending on what side of the ensuite hut, 1 side we can get further back, the other side we are very close to the hitch being on the road.
Nice caravan park with a couple of pools & water slides.

Average at best.
Spent the whole time in a cloud of cigarettes somehow wedged between all the people who love a chain smoke
Almost need to start separating the smokers from the non at this point
Can’t sit outside from the stench

Extremely Disappointing Experience - Would Not Recommend

We stayed at Discovery Parks Mackay for over a week without any issues until Friday night, when a disaster struck. Our tent site flooded due to a burst pipe under our tent, forcing my partner, dog, and I to sleep in our car. Despite calling the emergency number several times, no one responded until much later. We even had to ask neighboring campers to help us move our belongings out of the water.

When someone finally arrived, it was the groundskeeper who turned off the water and then blamed us for the flood, saying we placed our tent peg in the wrong spot—even though there were no warnings or markings. This was highly inappropriate and unprofessional, as it was clearly an issue with the park’s infrastructure.

The next morning, we spoke with the manager, who didn’t offer us any help or compensation. Other campers suggested that a decent response would have been to upgrade us to a cabin for the night, but the park staff showed no care or concern for our situation.

To make matters worse, when we went to the office to discuss the issue and request a refund for the nights we didn’t stay, the receptionist was dismissive and rude. She sighed while we explained our concerns, and despite initially promising to refund us for Sunday, the park later reneged on that commitment.

The level of service we received was unacceptable. Not only were we forced to leave due to an issue caused by the park’s poor infrastructure, but we were also treated poorly when trying to resolve the situation. I would not recommend staying at Discovery Parks Mackay, especially if you expect any kind of support or professionalism from the staff when things go wrong.

Central area to stay and sightsee around Mackay
Well kept, great amenities and friendly staff
We had a large caravan ensuite site, facilities are very dated. Was adequate.
Great camping site. Its too close to the highway so there’s a lot of noise at night
Very nice to stay relaxing and clean toilet
Great big Caravan park, lots of powered sites, drive through as well. Cabins and 2 amenities block, kept very clean. Also great pool for adults and kids also dog friendly. Very friendly staff.

The park is great the staff 10/10 but the park is aging although clean the cabins need attention the grounds could be amazing but the are kept but this park could be breathtaking I honestly hope the get the budget and help the need to bring this beautiful park up to modern day. I feel for the staff who do an amazing job. The kids have an array of choice for activities and for the dads and mums catch and release Barra. It's worth the stop just saying it could be so much more.

Discovery Parks Mackay is a great location for sight seeing. The sites are grassy and spacious. We had an ensuited site and it was very comfortable. The staff were friendly on arrival and the staff I've seen around the park are also friendly. We have stayed at a few Discovery Parks and I've been happy each time.

The site we had opposite the lagoon meant we could look out over the lagoon and see numerous birds, which was lovely. The traffic from the road and the industrial plant operating could be heard all night long. The ensuites while clean could use a bit of an upgrade. It was a shame with the park so full that half the washing machines were not operational leading to cues. We probably won’t stay there again.

We were not happy with the cleanliness of the cabin.  We could see the dust clinging to the walls and under the bed was very bad.  Our dog's ball rolled under the bed a few times and it was gross getting it out.  The broom and stick vacuum in the cabin were so dirty, we couldn't even use them.  The ceiling fans were so noisy we couldn't turn them on.  And one of our pet hates, shower curtains.  You never know how clean they really are.  One good thing is the enclosed porch for our dog.

Good stay with cool facilities (pool, mini golf etc). Check in and out is easy as. First few nights we had a lot with en-suite. Was lovely and clean. Just beware of the huge mosquitos taking over if you have a site by the water haha. Our Last night we had a normal site with communal bathrooms. They smelt damp and all the doors on toilets and showers have massive gaps on either side so doesn’t provide sufficient privacy… bit of a shame otherwise would’ve been 5 stars.
Great park, plenty of space.
We had an ensuite caravan site overlooking a lake. Plenty of bird life. Nice clean facilities. Great for our overnight stop.
Lovely quiet park on the edge of a lake, a large variety of Birdlife, even fishing.
Excellent place, very accommodating and helpful.

Great spot little out of town but iga pub etc 10min drive and marina tavern. We had an awesome big site opposite water you can relax and have a firepit.
The van site ensuite needs cleaning properly fans and wasp nests when fan was on a bad septic smell was around.
The laundry had 4 washers 2 out of order 2 dryers both out of order when I asked the Rude kiwi receptionist she had no idea if the led display was meant to be on or not then kept saying whilst I was talking
"Thank you have a good day"  pretty much saying I'm not interested go away who cares. I'd stay again but hopefully she would not be around.
What a lovely park. Ensuite and all. Lovely staff. Friendly and helpful.

Staff overcharged me then where rude about it . Rooms are dirty and damaged, table was broken , 70 % of tiles cracked badly, bathroom smelt like sewerage whole time , shower pressure really bad, shower liquids where half filled , bed was dirty. Water park is a hazard and dangerous. Staff where that rude will never stay here again 😤
We had a very big corner on suite which was great, on suite nice, good to get to harbour and main town.

The ensuite site was opposite a delightful lagoon. It was a large grassed site & easy access. The ensuite was old but clean. Desperately in need of a paint, the black shower curtain makes a dreary room even sadder. An easy drive to town or the harbour.

Beautiful park. Friendly staff.
Top location!
Conveniently located to most things we needed. Kids enjoyed fishing from the lake, peddle carts and mini golf!
Great kid friendly accommodation.
We love these parks so reasonably priced & lovely sites amenities are always clean we definitely will be back

We recently stayed at Discovery Parks - Mackay and had a wonderful experience! The check-in process was incredibly easy, thanks to the efficient and friendly staff who made us feel welcome right away.

The park itself was spotless, with well-maintained facilities that made our stay comfortable and enjoyable. We particularly appreciated the private ensuite that came with our site. It provided the perfect balance of camping and comfort, allowing us to enjoy the great outdoors without sacrificing modern conveniences.

Conveniently located in Mackay, the park offers easy access to all the local attractions and amenities. We found it to be an ideal base for exploring the area.

A light-hearted reminder for future guests: don't forget to bring some mozzie repellent for the evenings. The little critters can be quite persistent, but a bit of preparation goes a long way in ensuring a comfortable stay.

Overall, our experience at Discovery Parks - Mackay was excellent, and we highly recommend it!

This is a great place to stop and perfect if your travelling with kids as there are heaps of activities to keep them active in a safe spot, great range of camping and RV sites, the ensuite sites are a fantastic option, there can be quite a bit of road noise at night, nearby is popular with the burnout hoons, this isn't a fault of the park but I could hear them each night.

We spent a couple of nights here on our way North using an ensuite site.  The park is situated out of town ( 10Min) backing onto a lake?  Nice big flat sites with slabs if needed.  Great facilities for kids if you have them.  The ensuites sites need a bit of TLC  ( ours did site 206) they are clean but old and in need of maintenance,  Shower tap does not turn off so trickles constantly,  There is a light outside the ensuites that is on a sensor , that needs to be adjusted/replaced as it constantly turns off and on every 15-20 secs all night which becomes very annoying.  The outside tap on the building leaked through the handle so washers need replacing.  Small things that should be looked at  as that is what people notice.   Overall a nice park I would stay again as it is a good location and not noisy. Just small things
Loved our stay here! Great facilities, friendly staff and an awesome location.

We woke up on the first morning to our milk being off and the fridge not being cold. Management came and told us that the fridge had been turned up too high which meant it doesn't cool properly? We didnt touch the dial for it. She was aware that it's a problem with all the fridges in the cabjns apparently We said she should make signs and she said she had some and people keep stealing them. I asked to be reimbursed for the meat etc we lost and they gave us a $50 credit with discovery parks. The road was very noisy. The cabin was clean and great otherwise. Just thought it was not very professional to be aware of a problem with the fridges but not do anything about it.
Nice camping space. Kitchen is good! Although way too many mozzys!!
Lovely staff. Great place for families
Good for tradesman with dog
Great little park with great things for the kids. Centrally located. Short drive to retail shops. Would stay here again.
Loved our little holiday here, the children adored the amenities and for the price it was incredible staff were super friendly and having a hairdresser visiting the park was a welcome bonus!
Deluxe cabin comfortably fit a family of 4. The pool with a slide was a big hit, but being new year was very busy. Splash park was also great.

The camp itself is great, beautiful and clean.
But,
The noise from trucks and hoons most days goes into the early Am sleeping was hard due to noise.

Great spot to flick lures into the fresh water and catch a Barra.
Lovely caravan park. Right next to wetlands. All staff friendly & helpfull. Close to lots of touristy stuff

Recently spent a week here and we loved it! The park itself is perfect for kids. Plenty to do including the pool, mini golf and fishing in the small lake. We stayed in one of the bigger cabins and it was spacious. We had 2 issues during our stay, 1 was that the fridge didn't work and one evening our key snapped in the lock. Both were immediately resolved by the team (the key thing happened after hours too) and they were amazing to deal with.
For anyone traveling with a boat, cabin 147 was perfect. Good space for parking and easy to maneuver the boat around. Walked around the park and noticed all the common amenities were very clean too. Big thumbs up from me :)
Great little park with barramundi in the small lake behind the park

My ensuite was clean and tidy.
My site location was 212 which was perfect. Over looking the lake and abundance of bird life. Thank you to the office ladies.

Well located on a main road east of the city.  Easy to checkin and thecabin delivered all that we needed for a couple of nights in Mackay.   Well appointed cabin with an double induction stove top. Excellent shower and a roomy bedroom with sufficient power points for our needs.   A tv in the lounge and the bedroom a real bonus.
Thankyou for having us stay the night, we enjoyed our stay

Lovely clean pet friendly cabin with enclosed veranda at front. Overlooking the lake. Lots to do for kids (even though we had no kids with us) nice pool, jumping bag & mini golf.  Cabin had everything we needed including lots of hooks in the bathroom! Close to everything & easy to get to.
Great spot, and great service very clean amenities

Staff very welcoming and friendly. Big sites . Near to wetlands with nice bird life . Clean facilities . Kids area looked fun.
Dog friendly . They provide a little treat for dog and a choccy bar for you.
Only  minus- is location as  you can’t walk to anywhere.

We have stayed at this park on several occasions and the staff are always polite but just want to put in good word for Zoe she was amazing I asked for a different site that was no problem I queried the price she gave me a good deal nothing was to much for her and she always had a smile would recommend this lady she is a gem.

Lots of room.
Great walking space for our dogs.
The camp kitchen was nicely laid out.
Easy access to the sites.
Staff made you feel like old friends.
Bloody awesome

Good open park plenty of room easy to park you van no matter how big.
Being so close to the river it's boggy after a lot of rain because the water table is so close to the surface. The amenities are old but clean tidy and functional. Well worth the effort to come to it's about 4 or 5 ks from the main drag and 2 ks from the beach and surf clubs & Marina .
Amazing, so beautiful.  What a place..fantastic for families,  couples. So clean such friendly staff in reception.  So helpful when asked where to eat. What a Park...

2nd to none amazing service and effort with our families exceptional circumstances they made room for us in an extremely busy time. Can rate the genuine true Australian integrity the who of the staff team up held, at least this mob didn’t loose their marbles with Covid delusion.
Office staff went out of their way to assist us in a difficult situation.
Fantastic park, fresh clean pet friendly cabins, friendly reception, top spot, thoroughly recommend this park

We stayed in a powered site here. The sites were large and level. The kids loved the water slide. Kids section is awesome.
The laundry was clean. $4 a load is reasonable.  While I didn't use the camp kitchen it looked well equipped and clean. The bathrooms are quite old but clean enough. We found their toilets didn't really flush properly. The staff are friendly and you can tell they're making an effort to improve the park.

Wonderful stay at Discovery Parks - Mackay! Very grateful that the staff honoured our request!! Loved tenting near the lake, hearing the ducks and swamp hens!! Quiet and peaceful (the traffic noise can be heard sometimes, but it didn't bother us!). Super convenient for participating in the Mackay Marina Run (highly recommend this event in June, it's awesome!). Clean amenities. The kitchen facilities are so good! A gorgeous older lady even baked a cake in the little mini oven lol!! :P
Booking was easy.  Gave us a little gift for us and the dogs when arrived.  Facilities adequate and facilities great for kids.  Even had a dog minder if needed as the park is dog friendly.
One of the best parks I've ever stayed in. Staff go out of their way to make sure you enjoy your stay
Nice kept park
